title: FIR Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Forestry and Horticulture.
crs_summary: Forest Information Reform Act or the FIR Act This bill specifies that neither the Forest Service nor the Bureau of Land Management are required to reinitiate consultation on a land management plan when a new species is listed as threatened or endangered, critical habitat is designated, or new information reveals effects of the plan may affect a listed species or critical habitat in a manner or to an extent not previously considered.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Forestry and Horticulture.
